title: suntereo #4933
definition:
1) to preserve (a thing from perishing or being lost)
 2) to keep within one's self, keep in mind (a thing, lest it be forgotten)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to preserve (a thing from perishing or being lost)
 2) to keep within one's self, keep in mind (a thing, lest it be forgotten)

    NASB:  to keep close, i.e. preserve:
